synopsis: The storyline predominantly follows Iden Versio, former leader of the Imperial Special Forces Inferno Squadron. Upon witnessing destruction of the Death Star II, Versio and her troops set out to avenge The Emperor, and kill those responsible, namely, Luke Skywalker. The story will span thirty years, Starting near the end of the Galactic Civil War and ending at the destruction of Starkiller Base.
title: Battlefront II (2017)
